string.text: Hero Manager Enhanced failed to initialize. Check logs.
Hero Manager Enhanced loaded (Ammo Pickup, Perk Concierge, Adjustable Leveling).
Auto Ammo Pickup {VERSION}
Enable Mod
Master toggle. When off, no automatic ammo pickup will occur.
Pickup Mode
Controls what kind of ammo the mod will automatically pick up.
Mode: Default - any usable ammo from equipped weapons
Picks up any usable ammo type inferred from your equipped weapons and free slots.
Mode: Only currently equipped ranged weapon ammo
Restricts pickup to ammo compatible with the currently wielded ranged weapon.
Mode: Disabled
Disables automatic ammo pickup.
Default - Any usable ammo based on your equipped weapons
Only ammo for the currently equipped ranged weapon (in-hand)
Disable while crouching
When checked (default), automatic pickup is suspended while your character is in the crouched stance (default toggle key: Z).
Show Pickup Messages
Display a small yellow message when ammo is automatically picked up.
Auto Pickup Distance (meters)
How close (horizontal) the player must be to auto-pick up ammo. Lower values feel more realistic.
Auto Ammo Pickup loaded. Ammo will be automatically collected in battles when in range.
Picking up {AMOUNT} {ITEM}
Perk Concierge: added {ADDED} perks to player. Ignored {IGNORED} perk(s).
Ignored perks: {LIST}
Perk Concierge: campaign is not ready yet.
Perk Concierge: main hero is unavailable in the current context.
Perk Concierge
Automatically apply perks once after a campaign is loaded.
Perks Activation
Manually apply all available perks to the player now.
Increase/Decrease Skill Proficiency
Value to add to each player skill level (e.g. One Handed).
Apply Proficiency Change
Apply the slider value to all player skill levels now.
Perk Concierge: settings are unavailable.
Perk Concierge: skill proficiency delta is 0, nothing changed.
Perk Concierge: no skill definitions were found.
Perk Concierge: adjusted {COUNT} skills by {DELTA}. Clamped {CLAMPED} skill(s) to valid range.
Adjustable Leveling
Character Leveling
Faster Leveling Curve

Slower earlier but faster later levels, level 62 total: 40.7m [ON] vs 95.4m [OFF]. [Default: OFF] WARNING: Backup save recommended, changing this in an ongoing save will reset the level xp to half-way to the next level (if total xp is out of bounds for the current level after conversion)!
Maximum Character Level
Adjust the maximum achievable character level. Higher levels require much more xp! [Default: 62]
Character Level XP Modifier
Adjust how skill xp is converted into level xp, default is 1-to-1 at 1.00. [Default: 1.00]
Levels per Attribute Point
Number of level ups required to gain an attribute point. Only affects future level ups, so it should be changed before starting a new campaign to take full effect! [Default: 4]
Focus Points per Level
Focus points gained per level. [Default: 1]
Max Attribute Points for Attribute
Attribute point limit per attribute. [Default: 10]
Max Focus Points for Skill
Focus point limit per skill. (UI will at most show 5 points) [Default: 5]
Attribute Points at Start
Apparently affects the attribute points with which NPCs start, but not the player. [Default: 15]
Focus Points at Start
Apparently affects the focus points with which NPCs start, but not the player. [Default: 5]
Skill Leveling
Learning Limit Increase per Attribute Point
E.g. at 3 and with 10 AP an additional 30 skill points can be gained at reducing learning rate; at 5 an additional 50 can be gained. [Default: 3]
Learning Limit Increase per Focus Point
Adjust the learning limit increase per focus point. [Default: 50]
Base Learning Limit
The base learning limit achievable without focus points. [Default: 50]
Minimum Learning Rate
Set a minimum learning rate, so that no learning limit exists. [Default: 0.00]
Maximum Learning Rate
Set a maximum learning rate, zero disables it. [Default: 0.00]
Player Skill XP Modifier
Sets the skill learning rate for the player character. [Default: 1.00]
NPC Skill XP Modifier
Sets the skill learning rate for all NPCs, except clan members and companions. [Default: 1.00]
Clan Skill XP Modifier
Sets the skill learning rate for clan members. [Default: 1.00]
Companion Skill XP Modifier
Sets the skill learning rate for companions. [Default: 1.00]
Player Skills
Further modifies Player skills with a factor. [Default: 1.00]
NPC Skills
Further modifies NPC skills with a factor. Does not modify Clan Member or Companion skills. [Default: 1.00]
Clan Member Skills
Further modifies Clan Member skills with a factor. [Default: 1.00]
Companion Skills
Further modifies Companion skills with a factor. [Default: 1.00]
Troop XP Modifier
Modifies XP gained for upgrading troops. [Default 1.00]
Enable logging (careful, read info below)
WARNING: This can generate a lot of logs very quickly. Enable only for troubleshooting. [Default: Off]
Open Log Folder
Open Log Folder
Opens the Adjustable Leveling log folder in Explorer.
Reset All Settings
Reset All
Resets all Adjustable Leveling values to their defaults for this settings scope.
Smithing Research
Part Research Modifier
Adjust smithing part research gain rate for smithing and smelting weapons. [Default: 100%]
Free Build Part Research Modifier
Adjust smithing part research gain rate when in free build mode. [Default: 10%]
Reset Adjustable Leveling Settings
Reset all Adjustable Leveling values to their defaults? This cannot be undone.
Adjustable Leveling: all settings reset to defaults.
Adjustable Leveling: log directory path is unavailable.
Adjustable Leveling Log Size Warning

Adjustable Leveling detected large log files.

Combined size: {SIZE} MB across {COUNT} file(s).
Location: {DIR}

Consider disabling logging in MCM when not troubleshooting and deleting old log files.
